summary: Created scheduler module and GitHub Actions workflow. Scheduler queries Neon for due tasks (last_checked_at + check_interval_minutes elapsed), builds dispatch queue, and optionally dispatches to orchestrator /check endpoint. dry_run=true guarantee: queue is built but NOT dispatched. Workflow runs every 15 min Mon-Fri 9am-6pm ET with manual dispatch option.

verification.due_ness_query: Matches orchestrator queryDueTasks — JOIN url_registry + field_state, filter ACTIVE/STALE, check interval elapsed
verification.workflow_trigger: schedule (cron */15 9-17 * * 1-5) + workflow_dispatch with dry_run and batch_size inputs
